venues.name: Atlantide
venues.description: Main dining room on Deck 4, serving contemporary cuisine with panoramic ocean views. Regionally inspired menus that shift by itinerary; open for dinner with complimentary open seating, reservations required.

venues.name: S.A.L.T. Kitchen
venues.description: Sea And Land Taste flagship restaurant celebrating destination-driven cuisine. Menus rotate voyage to voyage, spotlighting local producers and regional techniques. Complimentary; reservations required.

venues.name: La Terrazza
venues.description: Italian trattoria on Deck 8 aft with al fresco terrace. Buffet breakfast and lunch daily; dinner à la carte with house-made pastas and traditional Italian mains. Complimentary.

venues.name: Silver Note
venues.description: Intimate supper-club venue pairing live jazz performances with globally inspired small plates and creative cocktails. Evening only; complimentary with reservations.

venues.name: The Marquee
venues.description: Indoor/outdoor casual dining combining The Grill (burgers, grilled mains) and Spaccanapoli, the ship's wood-fired Neapolitan pizzeria. Pool deck; lunch and casual evenings. Complimentary.

venues.name: Arts Café
venues.description: All-day café on Deck 7 serving specialty coffees, pastries, light bites, and afternoon tea. Central social hub throughout the day. Complimentary.

venues.name: La Dame
venues.description: Premium French fine-dining restaurant (Relais & Châteaux) with panoramic sea views and open entranceway. À la carte French menu or multi-course tasting menus with wine pairings. Dinner only; supplement $100 per person.

venues.name: Kaiseki
venues.description: Premium Japanese kaiseki multi-course dinner featuring seasonal ingredients, precise technique, and ceremonial presentation. Supplement charge approximately $80 per person.

venues.name: S.A.L.T. Chef's Table
venues.description: Exclusive multi-course immersive dining experience hosted by the executive chef, paired with wines and culinary storytelling tied to the voyage itinerary. Supplement approximately $180 per person.

venues.name: In-Suite Dining
venues.description: Complimentary 24-hour in-suite dining for all guests. Full menu service including breakfast through late-night selections delivered to every suite.
